description: Fix Gemini output truncation for long audio (voice_input-a3i). Root cause: vertex_proxy.py hardcodes max_output_tokens=512, truncating long transcriptions to ~1164 chars. CSV evidence: primary_asr=2250 chars, secondary_asr=2373 chars, but polished output only 1164 chars. Secondary issue: notify log [:120] truncation caused misdiagnosis of ASR truncation (ASR was actually complete).

userStories.title: vertex_proxy.py: accept max_output_tokens from JSON stdin
userStories.description: In vertex_proxy.py, read optional 'max_output_tokens' field from the stdin JSON payload. Use it in GenerateContentConfig instead of the hardcoded 512. Default to 512 when the field is absent (backward compatibility). Also update the --help text and the docstring to document the new field.
acceptanceCriteria: vertex_proxy.py reads data.get('max_output_tokens', 512) from stdin JSON
GenerateContentConfig uses the dynamic value, not hardcoded 512
When JSON has no max_output_tokens field, behavior is identical to before (512)
When JSON has max_output_tokens=2048, GenerateContentConfig uses 2048

userStories.title: post_processor_configs.py: dynamically compute and pass max_output_tokens
userStories.description: In post_processor_configs.py, both process_with_vertex_ai() and process_with_gemini_merge() must compute max_output_tokens dynamically based on user_input length, and include it in the JSON payload sent to vertex_proxy.py. Formula: min(8192, max(512, len(user_input))). This ensures long transcriptions get enough output token budget while capping at 8192 to prevent runaway costs.
acceptanceCriteria: For the real incident case (user_input ~4637 chars), max_output_tokens=4637
For extremely long text (user_input=20000 chars), max_output_tokens=8192 (cap)

userStories.title: voice_input.py: remove log [:120] truncation
userStories.description: Remove the [:120] string slicing from 4 log lines in voice_input.py that truncate ASR and post-processor output in the notify log. This truncation caused the misdiagnosis in voice_input-a3i (ASR looked truncated in logs but was actually complete in CSV). Lines: (1) line 1054 PP input log, (2) line 1128 PP output log, (3) line 1219 ASR-2 secondary log, (4) line 1225 ASR raw log.
acceptanceCriteria: No remaining [:120] truncation in any _log() call for ASR or PP output
